title: The Mathematics of Forgiveness as Categorification

analysis.object: T474: The Mathematics of Forgiveness as Categorification depth analysis

resentment.description: Resentment: trapped EML-3 oscillation between anger and memory

revenge.description: Revenge: attempted Deltad=-2 removal of harm measure
revenge.reason: trying to undo EML-2 measurement of harm

forgiveness_attempt.description: Attempted forgiveness from inside EML-3: feels impossible

forgiveness_event.reason: relationship enriches beyond finite description of offense

post_forgiveness.description: After forgiveness: relationship at new depth
post_forgiveness.reason: new category; cannot return to pre-forgiveness state

forgiveness_law.description: T474: forgiveness is Deltad=inf; resentment is trapped EML-3; this explains why it feels impossible from inside and obvious from outside

analysis.theorem: T474: The Mathematics of Forgiveness as Categorification (S753).
